tests.description: Authentication endpoint tests covering login (P0), logout (P0), registration (P1), and password reset (P0). Includes contract tests for request/response schemas.

User management endpoint tests covering GET /api/users (P0), POST /api/users (P0), GET /api/users/:id (P1), PUT /api/users/:id (P1), DELETE /api/users/:id (P1). Includes PBAC validation, soft delete, and contract tests.
Capabilities endpoint tests covering GET /api/capabilities (P1) and PUT /api/users/:id/capabilities (P0). Tests the complete 15-capability PBAC system, assignment, revocation, and validation.

summary: Generated comprehensive API test suite for Epic 1 covering 3 test files with 42 total tests. Auth endpoints (11 tests) cover login, logout, registration, and password reset. User endpoints (17 tests) cover full CRUD operations with PBAC validation and soft delete. Capabilities endpoints (14 tests) cover the complete 15-capability PBAC system. All tests include contract testing patterns using Pact.js verification, proper error handling, and cleanup procedures. Tests use Playwright's APIRequestContext for direct API calls, follow existing test patterns, and integrate with data factories.
